title: Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, Professor Posts
short_info: Utkal University, Bhubaneswar has officially released the faculty recruitment notification 2026 for various posts including Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor across multiple Post-Graduate Departments. This recruitment drive is a great opportunity for candidates with advanced academic qualifications and research experience seeking teaching positions in a prestigious central university. Eligible Indian citizens can apply online through the HIMS portal. The detailed advertisement including department-wise vacancies and reservation positions will be available on the Universit

important_dates.raw: Opening of Online Application: 15-05-2026 Closing of Online Application: 16-06-2026 Last Date for Receipt of Hard Copy (Registered/Speed Post): 29-06-2026

qualification.details: Minimum qualifications, eligibility criteria, and service conditions shall be governed by the UGC Regulations/Notifications, 2018, as amended from time to time .

how_to_apply: The application process is entirely online through the HIMS portal: https://hims.odisha.gov.in/home
After online submission, a hard copy along with all relevant documents must be sent to the Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar-751004, Odisha
Eligible candidates can apply online for Utkal University Faculty 2026 by following these steps:
important_instructions: Applicants are advised to carefully review all eligibility conditions, qualifications, and procedural requirements before submission. The University reserves the right to modify, amend, or cancel the advertisement, either in part or in full, without assigning any reason thereof .
